product_overview: HiddenDepths is an anonymous mental-health and well-being platform that offers curated insights, multi-step anonymous therapy booking (free or paid), real-time slot availability, and an admin dashboard for content and metrics management. The product integrates Supabase for auth/database, Razorpay for payments, and a Go backend exposing REST and WebSocket APIs consumed by a Next.js frontend.
core_goals: Provide an anonymous, low-friction booking experience for introductory therapy sessions (Sundays & Mondays, next 21 days).
Surface curated mental-health insights on the homepage carousel and allow admins to manage those insights.
Ensure real-time slot availability via WebSocket broadcasts to prevent double-booking.
Support a paid flow (₹99 sessions after 2026-02-02) with coupon/discount validation and secure Razorpay payment verification.
Expose protected user and admin APIs guarded by Supabase JWTs and role checks (admin whitelist).
Run background jobs for reminders, cleanup, and audit logging to maintain platform reliability and compliance.

features.name: Insights Carousel
features.description: Homepage carousel that fetches curated insight cards (images/videos) for display and adapts media rendering based on client performance tier.
user_flows: GET /api/insights -> Receive 200 with array of insight cards (title, media_type, media_url, id) -> GET /api/insights -> (repeat fetch for pagination/refresh as needed) Receive 200
GET /api/insights -> Receive 503 Service Unavailable (backend error) -> Frontend falls back to cached/placeholder slides (no further API calls)

features.name: Supabase Authentication (Auth Provider)
features.description: User sign-up/sign-in via Supabase (email/password and Google OAuth). Auth sessions supply JWTs for protected API calls to the Go backend.
user_flows: POST /supabase/auth/v1/token (email/password) with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with access_token (JWT) and user session -> GET /api/bookings/my with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> -> Receive 200 with user's bookings
POST /supabase/auth/v1/token (email/password) with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 invalid_credentials -> Frontend shows auth error and prevents protected API calls

features.name: Anonymous Therapy Booking
features.description: Multi-step booking: select a date (Sundays & Mondays only, next 21 days), view slot availability and recommendations, apply coupon (if paid), create booking (free immediate confirmation or paid returns Razorpay order), and verify payment.
user_flows: GET /api/slots/2026-03-15 -> Receive 200 with available and booked slot list for 2026-03-15 -> GET /api/bookings/recommendations/2026-03-15 -> Receive 200 with slot recommendation scores map -> GET /api/coupons/validate/WELCOME50 -> Receive 200 with discount type=percentage,value=50 and calculated discount_amount -> POST /api/bookings with booking payload and Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with razorpay_order_id -> POST /api/razorpay/verify-payment with razorpay_order_id, razorpay_payment_id, razorpay_signature -> Receive 200 payment_verified and booking confirmed

GET /api/slots/2026-03-15 -> Receive 200 showing target slot is already booked -> POST /api/bookings with booking payload and Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 409 slot_unavailable -> Frontend prompts user to pick another slot and re-fetches GET /api/slots/2026-03-15

features.name: Razorpay Payments
features.description: Server-side Razorpay order creation and secure HMAC-based payment verification to mark bookings as paid.
user_flows: POST /api/razorpay/create-order with booking reference and amount (called by POST /api/bookings or directly) -> Receive 200 with order_id, amount, currency -> Client completes Razorpay checkout using order_id -> POST /api/razorpay/verify-payment with razorpay_order_id, razorpay_payment_id, razorpay_signature -> Receive 200 and booking is marked as paid
POST /api/razorpay/verify-payment with razorpay_order_id, razorpay_payment_id, invalid_signature -> Receive 400 signature_mismatch and booking remains unpaid

features.name: Real-Time Slot Updates (WebSocket)
features.description: WebSocket hub broadcasts SLOT_BOOKED events when a booking is confirmed so clients can immediately mark slots as unavailable without a full refresh.
user_flows: CONNECT WebSocket to /api/ws -> Receive 101 Switching Protocols and open socket -> Receive SLOT_BOOKED event for 2026-03-15T11:00 -> GET /api/slots/2026-03-15 -> Receive 200 with updated slots showing 11:00 disabled
CONNECT WebSocket to /api/ws -> Connection refused / 502 -> GET /api/slots/2026-03-15 -> Receive 200 (polling fallback) -> Repeat polling until connection re-established

features.name: Coupon / Discount System
features.description: Validate coupon codes (percentage or fixed) with backend rules (max discount ₹99) and apply the discount to the booking amount before payment.
user_flows: GET /api/coupons/validate/WELCOME50 -> Receive 200 {type: 'percentage', value: 50, discount_amount: 49.5} -> POST /api/bookings with adjusted amount and Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 (order created)
GET /api/coupons/validate/EXPIREDCODE -> Receive 404 invalid_or_expired_coupon -> Frontend shows coupon error and retains original price

features.name: User Profile & Booking History
features.description: Authenticated user's profile page listing upcoming and past bookings with status, payment info, and cancel actions.
user_flows: GET /api/bookings/my with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with arrays: upcoming_bookings and past_bookings -> Frontend renders booking lists
GET /api/bookings/my without Authorization header -> Receive 401 unauthorized -> Frontend redirects to /login or shows auth modal

features.name: Admin Dashboard (Stats)
features.description: Protected admin endpoint exposing aggregate metrics (total bookings, revenue, active users) accessible only to admin-whitelisted emails.
user_flows: POST /supabase/auth/v1/token with admin credentials -> Receive 200 with access_token -> GET /api/admin/stats with Authorization: Bearer <admin_token> -> Receive 200 with totals {total_bookings, revenue, active_users}
GET /api/admin/stats with Authorization: Bearer <non_admin_token> -> Receive 403 access_denied

features.name: Admin Insights CRUD
features.description: Admin-only CRUD endpoints for managing insight cards that populate the homepage carousel.
user_flows: POST /api/admin/insights with insight payload and Authorization: Bearer <admin_token> -> Receive 201 with insight_id -> GET /api/insights -> Receive 200 including the newly created insight

DELETE /api/admin/insights/999 with Authorization: Bearer <admin_token> -> Receive 404 insight_not_found; or POST /api/admin/insights with Authorization: Bearer <non_admin_token> -> Receive 403 access_denied

code_summary.description: A mental-health and well-being platform offering anonymous therapy sessions, insights content, and booking management. Features a WebGL ocean-themed UI, Razorpay payments, Supabase authentication, and an admin dashboard.

features.name: Insights Carousel
features.description: Auto-rotating carousel on the homepage displaying curated mental-health insights (images and videos). Supports keyboard navigation, touch/swipe, dot indicators, Prev/Next buttons, Pause/Play toggle, and performance-tier adaptive rendering (low/mid/ultra).

features.name: Anonymous Therapy Booking
features.description: Multi-step booking flow: select a date (Sundays & Mondays only, next 21 days), pick a time slot with real-time availability via WebSocket, fill a form with optional coupon code, and confirm. Paid sessions (₹99 after Feb 2 2026) use Razorpay checkout; free sessions confirm instantly.

features.name: Supabase Authentication
features.description: Email/password sign-up and sign-in plus Google OAuth via Supabase. Auth state managed through React Context (AuthProvider). Session tokens are forwarded to the Go backend for protected API calls.

features.name: Razorpay Payments
features.description: Backend creates a Razorpay order, frontend opens Razorpay checkout modal, and after payment the frontend posts verification data to the backend. Backend validates the HMAC signature and marks the booking as paid.

features.name: Real-Time Slot Updates
features.description: WebSocket hub in the Go backend broadcasts SLOT_BOOKED events so all connected clients see slots become unavailable in real time.

features.name: Coupon/Discount System
features.description: Users enter a discount code in the booking form. The backend validates it (percentage or fixed amount, max ₹99 discount). The UI shows the discounted price before payment.

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Protected admin area at /admin/dashboard showing platform stats (total bookings, revenue, active users). Requires admin role (email whitelist check in AdminMiddleware).

features.name: Admin Insights CRUD
features.description: Admin page at /admin/insights for creating, updating, and deleting insight cards. Each insight has a title, description, media URL, and media type (image or video).

features.name: User Profile & Booking History
features.description: Profile page at /profile showing upcoming and past bookings with status and details. Accessible only when authenticated.

features.name: Blog
features.description: Static blog section with article pages covering mental-health topics such as anonymous therapy benefits, digital mental health spaces, and signs you need mental health support.

features.name: WebGL Ocean Theme
features.description: Full-screen caustic ocean shader (OGL library) as the site background. Performance tier detection adjusts rendering quality. Includes ambient background sound with fade in/out.

features.name: PWA Support
features.description: Progressive Web App manifest and service worker via next-pwa for offline capability and installability.

features.name: Neural Slot Recommendations
features.description: Backend recommendation engine scores available time slots and surfaces a "RECOMMENDED" badge for high-score slots (score > 0.7).

features.name: Scheduled Reminders & Cleanup
features.description: Cron jobs in the Go backend send booking reminders (hourly) and clean up stale/expired bookings (every 15 minutes).

features.name: Audit Logging
features.description: Backend audit service logs significant actions for compliance and debugging.

pages_and_routes.description: Landing page. Renders the WebGL Scene, CausticOcean background, and the Overlay component which contains the hero section and the Insights Carousel. The hero has a call-to-action linking to /booking.
Login page. Renders the AuthModal component which auto-opens on mount. Provides email/password sign-in and Google OAuth. On successful auth, redirects to /booking or the previously intended page.
Booking page. Renders the BookingCalendar component which auto-opens after authentication. Contains the full multi-step booking flow (calendar → slots → form → success).
User profile page. Shows upcoming and past bookings. Requires authentication; redirects to /login if not signed in.
Payment confirmation page displayed after successful Razorpay payment. Shows booking details and a confirmation message.
Blog listing page. Displays cards linking to individual blog articles about mental health topics.
Article about benefits of anonymous therapy.
Article about digital mental health spaces.
Article about signs you need mental health support.
Frequently asked questions page with expandable Q&A sections.
About page describing the platform and the mentor/founder.
Admin dashboard showing platform statistics (bookings, revenue, users). Protected — requires authentication and admin role.
Admin insights management page. CRUD interface for insight cards. Protected — requires authentication and admin role.

components.name: AuthModal
components.description: Modal dialog for authentication. Supports sign-in and sign-up modes with email/password fields and a Google OAuth button. Auto-opens when the /login page mounts.

key_elements.description: Submit button text changes between "SIGN IN" and "SIGN UP" depending on the current mode.
Link text toggles between "Don't have an account? Sign Up" and "Already have an account? Sign In".
Button to initiate Google OAuth sign-in via Supabase.

components.name: BookingCalendar
components.description: Multi-step booking modal with 4 views: calendar, slots, form, and success. Handles free and paid session flows including Razorpay integration and coupon validation.

steps.description: Date selection. Shows available Sundays & Mondays for the next 21 days as a scrollable list. Dates after Feb 2 2026 show a ₹99 price badge. Promotional banner reads "Limited Slots: Sundays & Mondays Only".

Time slot selection. Available times: 11:00 AM, 11:45 AM, 12:30 PM, 08:00 PM, 08:45 PM. Booked slots are disabled with strikethrough. High-score slots (> 0.7) show a "RECOMMENDED" badge. Real-time WebSocket updates disable slots booked by others.

Booking details form. Fields for name, email, and (for paid sessions) a discount code. Shows session summary card with date, time, and price. Submit button reads "CONFIRM BOOKING" for free sessions or "PROCEED TO PAYMENT ₹99" for paid.

key_elements.label: Discount Code
key_elements.note: Only visible for paid sessions (after Feb 2 2026)

key_elements.description: Validates the coupon code via GET /api/coupons/validate/{code}. On success, updates the displayed price with the discount.

steps.description: Success confirmation with animated checkmark, booking details, and a "Return to Sanctuary" button linking back to the homepage.

components.name: Carousel
components.description: Insights carousel on the homepage. Auto-rotates every 7 seconds. Displays insight cards with images or video backgrounds. Adapts masking based on performance tier.

key_elements.description: Row of clickable dots (one per slide). Active dot is scaled up with accent color. Each dot has aria-selected and aria-label attributes.
Text at the bottom center showing current slide position, e.g. "Slide 1 of 5".

components.name: Overlay
components.description: Main UI overlay layered on top of the WebGL Scene. Contains the hero section with headline and CTA, and the Carousel section. Also wraps modal containers.

components.name: CausticOcean
components.description: WebGL caustic ocean shader rendered using OGL. Creates the animated underwater visual effect as the site background.

components.name: Scene
components.description: Fixed full-screen container for the WebGL scene.

components.name: SoundController
components.description: Background ambient ocean sound with fade in/out controls.

components.name: SmoothScroll
components.description: Lenis-based smooth scroll wrapper for the entire application.

components.name: UserMenu
components.description: User dropdown menu showing the authenticated user's info with links to /profile and a sign-out action.

components.name: StructuredData
components.description: JSON-LD structured data for SEO (Organization, LocalBusiness).

components.name: DebugPanel
components.description: Developer debug panel toggled with Shift+D. Shows and allows changing the current performance tier (low/mid/ultra).

public.description: Fetch all insight cards for the carousel.
Get booked slot times for a given date (YYYY-MM-DD format). Used by BookingCalendar to show which slots are unavailable.
Get slot recommendation scores for a date. Returns a map of time strings to float scores. Slots with score > 0.7 get "RECOMMENDED".

public.http_method_note: Listed as GET in router; accessible via GET
public.description: Validate a coupon code. Returns discount type (percentage or fixed), discount value, and calculated discount amount.
WebSocket endpoint for real-time slot availability updates. Broadcasts SLOT_BOOKED events when bookings are confirmed.

protected_user.description: Get the authenticated user's bookings (upcoming and past). Requires Authorization header with Supabase JWT.
Get the authenticated user's active subscription.
Create a new booking. For paid sessions, returns a Razorpay order_id for the frontend to initiate checkout. For free sessions, confirms the booking immediately.

protected_admin.description: Admin dashboard statistics: total bookings, revenue, active users, and other aggregate metrics.

payment.description: Create a Razorpay order for a paid booking. Called internally by POST /api/bookings when the session requires payment.
Verify Razorpay payment. Accepts razorpay_order_id, razorpay_payment_id, and razorpay_signature. Backend validates the HMAC signature and marks the booking as paid.

methods.description: Email/password sign-up and sign-in. Minimum password length is 6 characters.
Google OAuth via Supabase. Initiated by clicking the Google button in AuthModal.

login_page.behavior: The AuthModal auto-opens when the /login page mounts. After successful authentication, the user is redirected to /booking or the page they originally intended to visit.

session_management.description: React Context provider that wraps the app. Listens to Supabase onAuthStateChange and exposes the current session/user object.

backend_auth.description: AuthMiddleware extracts the JWT from the Authorization header, validates it against Supabase, and injects the user ID into the request context.

admin_auth.description: AdminMiddleware checks if the authenticated user's email is in the admin whitelist.

elements.name: Sign Up Toggle
elements.text: Don't have an account? Sign Up
elements.testsprite_action: click to switch to sign-up mode

elements.name: Google OAuth Button
elements.description: Button with Google icon for OAuth sign-in

step_1_calendar.description: Grid of available dates (Sundays & Mondays). Each date is a clickable card showing the day name, date, and optionally a ₹99 badge.
step_1_calendar.testsprite_action: click on an available date card

step_2_slots.description: Grid of time slot buttons. Available slots are clickable; booked slots are disabled with strikethrough text. Recommended slots have a badge.
step_2_slots.testsprite_action: click on an available time slot button

elements.name: Email Input
elements.label: Email Address
elements.testsprite_action: verify pre-filled or fill with test email

elements.name: Coupon Code Input
elements.label: Discount Code
elements.visibility: Only visible for paid sessions (dates after Feb 2 2026)

elements.name: Apply Coupon Button
elements.description: Validates coupon via API and updates displayed price

elements.name: Confirm/Pay Button
elements.testsprite_action: click to submit booking or initiate payment

elements.name: Insights Heading
elements.testsprite_action: scroll to this heading to find carousel

elements.name: Previous Button
elements.testsprite_action: click to go to previous slide

elements.name: Next Button
elements.testsprite_action: click to go to next slide

elements.name: Dot Indicators
elements.description: Row of small circular buttons, one per slide. Active dot has accent color and is scaled up (scale-125). Each dot has aria-selected.
elements.testsprite_action: click specific dot to jump to that slide

elements.name: Slide Counter
elements.testsprite_action: read text to verify current slide position

profile_page.description: Shows authenticated user's upcoming and past bookings with details including date, time, status, and payment info.

admin_dashboard.description: Admin statistics page showing aggregate metrics: total bookings, revenue, active users. Only accessible to admin-whitelisted emails.

admin_insights.description: CRUD interface for managing insight cards. Admins can create, edit, and delete insights that appear in the homepage carousel.

user_menu.location: Top-right corner of the page (when authenticated)
